title: Stories
description: List of stories (tasks) for a dev agent. Stories can belong to a sprint.

phase.description: SDLC phase. Orthogonal to status: a story can be in_progress in the coding phase. Each phase typically has a different expert agent assigned.

assigned_agent_id.description: Agent expert who owns this story in its current phase. When phase changes, this is typically reassigned.

sprint_id.description: ID of the sprint this story belongs to. Null = backlog.

project_id.description: Workspace project the story is scoped to. Null = workspace-global (cuts across projects). Stories created before this field existed are read as null.

epic.description: Free-text epic label, e.g. 'Auth Hardening' or 'Perf Sprint'.
